title: crotalaria orixensis
intro: Crotalaria orixensis, also known as the yellow rattle, is a perennial plant species belonging to the legume family. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to inhibit the growth of certain types of bacteria and fungi. The medicinal properties of Crotalaria orixensis provide various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of infections and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as an infusion or decoction to harness its medicinal properties.
